title: Change ENZOxSENSI text color to white

requirements.summary: Update the ENZOxSENSI title text color to white in the App.tsx header component
acceptanceCriteria: The ENZOxSENSI text in the header displays in white color
The text color change is visible against the black background
No other text colors in the application are affected

file_operations.description: Modify the header component to change the ENZOxSENSI branding text color from its current styling to white using the text-white Tailwind CSS class or equivalent white color styling. Locate the ENZOxSENSI text element in the header and update its className or style to apply white color.
